title: Fix paste retrieval and remove draft editor origin errors

requirements.summary: Remove or suppress the draft editor origin error that appears in the console during paste operations
acceptanceCriteria: Console no longer shows draft-editor origin errors
Paste creation and viewing functionality remains unaffected

file_operations.description: Update the console.error filtering logic to properly suppress the draft-editor origin error from https://molecular-lavender-hsv-draft.caffeine.xyz. Ensure the filter catches both the exact error message format and any variants, while maintaining documentation that these are non-blocking platform preview warnings.

Verify that draftEditorDiagnostics is properly initialized early in the application lifecycle before any paste operations occur. Ensure the error suppression is active before the App component renders.
